title: Privacy Policy
intro: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information when you use the Tariq Islam app and website.

personal.title: Personal Information
personal.body: We may collect your name, email address, and profile information when you create an account.

usage.title: Usage Information
usage.body: We collect information about how you use the app, including features accessed and time spent.

device.title: Device Information
device.body: We may collect device type, operating system, and basic technical information.

use.title: How We Use Your Information
bullets: To provide and maintain the app

sharing.title: How We Share Information
sharing.lead: We do not sell your personal information. We may share information in the following situations:

withUsers.label: With other users:
withUsers.body: Your profile information may be visible to other users.

providers.label: Service providers:
providers.body: We may share data with trusted service providers who help operate the app.

legal.label: Legal requirements:
legal.body: We may disclose information if required by law.

transfers.label: Business transfers:
transfers.body: Information may be transferred if we undergo a merger or acquisition.

security.title: Security
security.body: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information.

access.label: Access:
access.body: You may request access to your data.

deletion.label: Deletion:
deletion.body: You may request deletion of your account.

optOut.label: Opt-out:
optOut.body: You may opt out of certain communications.

portability.label: Portability:
portability.body: You may request a copy of your data.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: We may use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience.

children.title: Children
children.body: The app is not intended for children under 13 without parental supervision.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may update this policy from time to time.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.lead: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us:
contact.formLine: You may also contact us through the app.
